packageRules.description: Python pyenv (.python-version): don't gate on Docker Hub republish time
Force Renovate to evaluate patches independently, but strictly IGNORE alphas/betas
Disable minor, major, and prerelease updates for Python (pep621/pyenv managers)
Disable Python updates via pixi entirely to avoid pep440 range calculation failures on pre-releases
Pin pep621 deps so all version moves edit pyproject.toml and go through update-type rules
Keep requires-python as a range (>=X.Y); pixi/uv/docker can lag behind latest CPython patch
Major bumps must be reviewed: dedicated PR editing pyproject.toml, never auto-merged
Minor bumps on pyproject deps: require manual review so new features in libraries get noticed
Patch bumps on pyproject deps: safe to auto-merge alongside lockfile maintenance
CalVer packages (yt-dlp YYYY.M.D): use pep440 versioning for correct comparison; all updates require manual review (overrides pep621 patch automerge)
